nasb.text: The Lord will remove from you all sickness; and He will not put on you any of the harmful diseases of Egypt which you have known, but He will lay them on all who hate you.

esv.text: And the Lord will take away from you all sickness, and none of the evil diseases of Egypt, which you knew, will he inflict on you, but he will lay them on all who hate you.

cnv.text: 耶和華必使一切病症離開你；你所知埃及各種的惡疾，他決不加在你身上，卻加在一切恨你的人身上。

ccb.text: 耶和华要使你们免患疾病，免遭你们在埃及所见的恶疾，祂要把那些恶疾降在一切憎恶你们的人身上。
